content: I've been thinking about making our wedding more eco-friendly next year. We're planning to get married in June at a vineyard in Napa Valley.
That's a wonderful idea! A vineyard wedding sounds beautiful. What kind of eco-friendly changes are you considering?

We're looking at digital invitations instead of paper, and I want to use seasonal, locally-sourced flowers. I've also been researching sustainable catering options. As a Product Designer at a fintech startup, I'm used to thinking about systems and efficiency, so it's interesting to apply that mindset to wedding planning.
